howItWorks.intro: This cat age calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: After 2: +4 human years per cat year
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How long do cats live?
faq.answer: Indoor cats average 12-18 years. Outdoor cats average 5-10 years due to traffic, predators, and disease. Some indoor cats live past 20.

faq.question: When is a cat considered senior?
faq.answer: Cats are considered senior at 11 years (about 60 human years). They may need more frequent vet visits and dietary adjustments.

faq.question: Do indoor cats age differently?
faq.answer: Indoor cats tend to age more slowly due to less environmental stress. They need stimulation through play and enrichment to stay healthy.

faq.question: What is the oldest cat on record?
faq.answer: Creme Puff from Texas lived to 38 years old, equivalent to about 168 human years.
